body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, here is the weekly permit summary for the period ending {DATE}. Building issued {NUM} new permits this week: {NUM} residential, {NUM} commercial, and {NUM} miscellaneous/accessory. Total active permits outstanding: {NUM}. Inspection completions were at {NUM} for the week. Our current average turnaround from application to issuance is {DAYS} business days, which is within our target. One large commercial project at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} is pending engineer sign-off before we can issue. I will flag if that slips. Rosa Marchetti
reply_tmpl: Rosa — thanks for the clean summary. Keep an eye on {ADDRESS}; I want that commercial permit moving. Please loop in Tom Reyes if the engineering hold goes past {DATE}.

body_tmpl: Tom, I have a commercial addition permit at {ADDRESS} ({STREET} near {CROSS}) that is stalled pending your structural review. Applicant submitted drawings on {DATE} and is asking for a status update. This is a {NUM}-sq-ft addition to an existing retail building. I need your written concurrence or a punch list of deficiencies so I can either issue or send a deficiency letter. Can you target {DATE} for a response? Happy to set up a quick call if that helps.
reply_tmpl: Rosa — I pulled the drawings. There are two items: the beam sizing on grid line C and drainage from the new impervious area. I'll have a formal deficiency memo to you by {DATE}. Should take the applicant roughly {DAYS} days to resubmit if they move quickly.

body_tmpl: Karen, I want to flag a growing inspection backlog in the Building Department. As of {DATE} we have {NUM} inspections pending, with average wait time stretching to {DAYS} business days. Our inspector capacity is at full utilization due to the number of active construction sites along {STREET} and {CROSS}. I am recommending we engage a contract inspector for {DAYS} days to clear the backlog and restore our {DAYS}-day target turnaround. Estimated cost is approximately {AMOUNT}. Can we discuss at the next staff meeting?
reply_tmpl: Rosa, I hear you. Let's schedule {DATE} to go over the numbers. If the contract figure is under {AMOUNT}, I can approve from contingency without a council line item. Bring your three-month workload projection.

body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, attached is the monthly building activity report for {DATE}. Highlights: permits issued this month totaled {NUM}, up {NUM} percent from the same month last year. Permit revenue collected: {AMOUNT}. Notable projects include the new warehouse at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} and the remodel at {ADDRESS}. We completed {NUM} inspections and issued {NUM} stop-work orders for work without permits. One certificate of occupancy was issued for the new retail build-out at {ADDRESS}. Full detail in the attached spreadsheet.

Rosa, I completed the structural review for the permit at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The drawings are approved with one condition: the applicant must provide a special inspection agreement for the concrete footings before we can schedule the foundation inspection. Please add that as a permit condition before issuance. I also noticed the grading plan shows drainage toward the adjacent parcel — Code Enforcement should be looped in if they disturb more than {NUM} square feet of soil. Tom Reyes, P.E.
reply_tmpl: Got it, Tom — I'll add the special inspection condition and copy Sandra on the grading concern. Thanks for the quick turnaround.

body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I wanted to give you a progress update on the {STREET} stormwater study. We have completed the hydrologic modeling for the {STREET} / {CROSS} basin and identified three areas with chronic flooding during the {NUM}-year storm event: near {ADDRESS}, the intersection at {STREET} and {CROSS}, and the low point on {STREET}. The draft report is expected by {DATE}. Preferred remediation is a new detention basin at approximately {ADDRESS} with an estimated capital cost of {AMOUNT}. I will present options to the council after the report is finalized.
reply_tmpl: Tom — good work. Get me a one-page executive summary before the {DATE} council meeting so I can brief the aldermen. What's the grant picture look like for this one?

body_tmpl: Frank, the stormwater study flagged the culvert at {STREET} and {CROSS} as undersized and at end of life. Based on the hydraulic model, we need a {NUM}-inch RCP culvert, roughly {NUM} linear feet, to convey the 100-year flow without overtopping. I'll have construction plans ready by {DATE}. Estimated construction cost is {AMOUNT}. Can your crew handle the traffic control, or do we need to put this out to bid? Also, please confirm the upstream ditch was cleaned after last winter — that's affecting our model inputs.
reply_tmpl: Tom — my crew can do traffic control but not the pipe work at that size. We'll need to bid it. I'll have the upstream ditch inspected by {DATE} and report back.

subject_tmpl: IEPA Permit Required — Detention Basin Project
body_tmpl: Karen, I need to flag that our proposed detention basin on {STREET} will require an IEPA National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System permit before we can break ground. Application lead time is typically {DAYS} days. To meet our target construction start of {DATE}, I need authorization to engage our environmental consultant by {DATE}. Fee estimate for the permit application is {AMOUNT}. This is a hard regulatory requirement and cannot be waived. Please advise so I can issue the consultant notice to proceed.

Mayor Okonkwo, I am pleased to report that the {STREET} resurfacing project reached substantial completion on {DATE}, {DAYS} days ahead of the original schedule. Verdi Excavating finished the final lift on the {STREET} to {CROSS} segment this afternoon. Punch-list items are limited to pavement markings and two ADA ramp pads, which will be completed by {DATE}. Total expenditure to date is {AMOUNT} against a budget of {AMOUNT}. We came in under budget by {AMOUNT}. I will issue the final project closeout report by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Excellent news, Tom — under budget and ahead of schedule. Please send me a photo and a one-pager for the next newsletter. Well done to you and the Verdi crew.

body_tmpl: Frank, the PCI survey we commissioned is complete. Results for the {STREET} and {CROSS} corridors came in at an average PCI of {NUM}, which is in the 'poor' category and triggers priority resurfacing under our asset management plan. Three blocks on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} scored below {NUM} and should be included in next year's capital program. I'll prepare the five-year pavement plan update for council by {DATE}. Can you let me know the status of any pothole repairs on those blocks so I can note interim maintenance?
reply_tmpl: Tom — we patched {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} on {DATE}. Those patches are holding for now but agreed they're a short-term fix. I'll document and send photos.

subject_tmpl: IDOT Permit Application — {STREET} at Mannheim Rd
body_tmpl: Yolanda, I need a certified copy of the Village's motor fuel tax allotment certificate and our current engineering resolution for an IDOT permit application related to the proposed driveway access modification at {ADDRESS} on Mannheim Road. The application deadline is {DATE}. I also need the council resolution authorizing our engineer to submit on behalf of the Village — could you pull the one from {DATE} or confirm a new one is needed? Please let me know what you have available and when you can get the certified copies to me.
reply_tmpl: Tom — I have both documents. I'll have certified copies ready by {DATE}. The {DATE} engineering resolution should still be current but I'll verify with the Village Attorney.

body_tmpl: Sandra, during a routine inspection at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} on {DATE} my inspector observed a recently constructed wood deck approximately {NUM} square feet that has no permit on file. The property owner is {FIRST} {LAST}. I have issued a stop-work order and left a notice requiring application within {DAYS} days. After {DAYS} days, if no application is received, please open a code violation case. I'll attach the inspector's photo report. Let me know if you need anything further from my end.
reply_tmpl: Rosa — got it, I'll open a pending case and put the {DAYS}-day trigger on my calendar. If they apply, let me know and I'll close the referral.

body_tmpl: Rosa, I have an open code case at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} (Case {CASE}) involving a property owner who claims all work was permitted and inspected. Can you pull any permit and inspection history for that address going back {DAYS} days and share it with me? Specifically I need to know if permit {CASE} had a final inspection sign-off. The hearing is scheduled for {DATE} and I want to go in with the full record. Thanks.
reply_tmpl: Sandra — I pulled the history. Permit {CASE} had a rough-in inspection on {DATE} but never received a final. I'll email you the official records extract this afternoon.

body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I wanted to give you a heads-up that {BIZ} has requested a pre-application meeting for a proposed {NUM}-square-foot development at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The meeting is set for {DATE} at {TIME}. Attendees from our side will include myself, Tom Reyes, and Frank DiMeo. The project involves a new building, parking lot, and stormwater detention. This is the largest commercial project we have had inquiries about this year. If you want to attend or have talking points you'd like us to convey, please let me know before {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Rosa — I'll plan to stop in for the first 15 minutes. Make sure we have our fee schedule and the village's development checklist ready to hand over. Good sign for the corridor.

subject_tmpl: Grant Application Submitted — CMAP Surface Water Quality
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I submitted our CMAP Surface Water Quality grant application on {DATE} for the {STREET} stormwater project. We applied for {AMOUNT} in federal pass-through funding to cover design and construction of the detention basin and upstream swale improvements. CMAP expects to announce awards by {DATE}. Our local match obligation, if awarded, would be {AMOUNT} from the capital fund. This was a competitive application and I am cautiously optimistic given the basin's documented flooding history. I'll keep you posted on the timeline.

subject_tmpl: IDOT Mannheim Rd Coordination — Meeting Notes {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, here are the key takeaways from our coordination call with IDOT District 1 on {DATE} regarding the Mannheim Road signal timing project. IDOT confirmed the adaptive signal control system will be installed at {NUM} intersections, including Mannheim at {CROSS} and Mannheim at {CROSS}. Village action items: provide updated traffic count data by {DATE}, and confirm utility conflicts at {ADDRESS}. IDOT's construction window is {DATE} through {DATE}. I will follow up with Frank DiMeo on the utility coordination. No Village funding is required for this project.
reply_tmpl: Tom — thanks. Loop in Frank and keep me posted. If IDOT needs a letter of support from the Mayor's office, draft one and I'll sign it.

body_tmpl: David, as you prepare the mid-year budget review, here is the Building Department fee revenue through {DATE}. Permit fees collected: {AMOUNT}. Plan review fees: {AMOUNT}. Re-inspection fees: {AMOUNT}. Total YTD: {AMOUNT} against a full-year budget of {AMOUNT}. We are tracking {NUM} percent above budget due to the surge in commercial activity on {STREET}. I expect the second half to remain strong given {NUM} large permits in the pipeline. Let me know if you need additional breakdowns for your presentation.

subject_tmpl: Permit Application Status — No Response for {DAYS} Days
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I submitted a permit application for a fence at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} and have not received any response in {DAYS} days. I called the Building Department twice and left messages with no callback. My contractor is scheduled to start on {DATE} and I do not want to delay. My permit application number is {CASE}. Can someone please look into this? My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and my phone is {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Mr./Ms. {LAST} — I am very sorry for the delay. I have asked our Building Official Rosa Marchetti to personally pull your application {CASE} and contact you today. We will get you an answer no later than {DATE}.

body_tmpl: Ms. Marchetti, we completed construction of our new tenant fit-out at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} under permit {CASE}. Our contractor finished on {DATE} and we passed our final electrical inspection. We are ready for your final building inspection and hope to obtain our certificate of occupancy by {DATE} when our lease commences. Please let us know the earliest available inspection date and what additional documentation you need from us. Our project contact is {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE}. Thank you for your help throughout this project.
reply_tmpl: Good afternoon — I have you scheduled for a final inspection on {DATE} at {TIME}. Please ensure the building is accessible and your contractor's special inspection reports are on site. If everything passes, the C of O will be issued the same day.

subject_tmpl: Flooding in My Backyard After Every Rain — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I am writing about the flooding problem at my home at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Every time we get more than an inch of rain, my backyard holds water for days. My neighbor at {ADDRESS} had a new patio installed last spring that I believe is directing runoff onto my property. I have complained before and nothing has changed. The standing water is damaging my fence and creating a mosquito problem. Can the Village please investigate? {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — thank you for reaching out. I am asking our Village Engineer Tom Reyes to schedule a site visit within {DAYS} business days to assess the drainage situation at your address. You will receive a call from his office to coordinate. We take drainage complaints seriously and will follow up.

subject_tmpl: Storm Sewer Inspection Request — {STREET} Between {CROSS} and {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Frank, following the flooding complaint on {STREET}, I need your crew to camera-inspect the storm sewer between {CROSS} and {CROSS} when you get a break in the rain. The segment is approximately {NUM} linear feet of what appears to be old clay tile on our GIS layer. I want to confirm it hasn't collapsed or silted in. If you find blockages, try to jet it and document what comes out. Can you estimate when you could get to this? I'd like the video before {DATE} so I can include findings in the drainage report.
reply_tmpl: Tom — we can get camera in there by {DATE}. That section has been on our watch list since last winter's freeze-thaw cycle. I'll have the crew document everything and send you the recording.

body_tmpl: Reggie, I issued a stop-work order at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} on {DATE} for construction without a permit. As of today the work appears to be continuing in violation of the order. I do not have enforcement authority to physically stop work, so I am requesting police assistance to make contact with the person on site and reinforce the stop-work order. The owner of record is {FIRST} {LAST}. This is a safety issue — unpermitted framing work. If you could have an officer make a visit before {TIME} today that would be very helpful.
reply_tmpl: Rosa — I'll dispatch a unit to {ADDRESS} this afternoon. Officer will document and I'll loop you in on what they find. If the work continues after the police contact, let me know and we can assist with the citation process.

subject_tmpl: Capital Project Budget Transfer Request — {STREET} Project
body_tmpl: David, the {STREET} resurfacing project came in {AMOUNT} under the original contract amount due to favorable asphalt pricing. I would like to request a budget transfer of {AMOUNT} of that savings to the {STREET} drainage improvement line item, which is currently underfunded by {AMOUNT}. Both projects are in the same capital fund. The transfer would allow us to complete the {STREET} work in this fiscal year without a supplemental appropriation. Please let me know if this is feasible and what documentation you need from me.
reply_tmpl: Tom — a budget transfer of that size requires a journal entry and council ratification at the next meeting. Send me the project numbers and I'll draft the transfer for Karen's review. It's straightforward from an accounting standpoint.

subject_tmpl: Demo Permit Issued — Asbestos Survey Required at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Priya, I issued a demolition permit for the structure at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} with a condition that the owner provide an asbestos survey from a licensed inspector before we authorize the demolition start date. The property is pre-1980 construction and the condition is standard. I want to make sure your department is in the loop in case you receive calls about the demolition activity. The anticipated demo date is around {DATE}. Permit number is {CASE}. Let me know if you have questions or if you want to be copied on the asbestos report when it comes in.

subject_tmpl: CDBG Street Improvement Grant — Award Notification
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I received confirmation this morning that Cook County has awarded Bellwood {AMOUNT} in CDBG funding for street improvements on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. This is excellent news — the Village match is {AMOUNT}, which is already budgeted. I will execute the grant agreement by {DATE} and target a bid opening in {DATE}. The project scope includes full-depth reclamation, new curb and gutter, and ADA-compliant crosswalk ramps. This was a priority in our five-year capital plan and I look forward to getting it built.
reply_tmpl: Tom — fantastic! Please draft a press release for Tina by {DATE}. I also want to inform the alderman in that ward personally before we go public. Well done on the application.

body_tmpl: Karen, we received {NUM} proposals in response to our RFP for the Stormwater Master Plan. I have completed the technical scoring with the review committee. The top-ranked firm is {BIZ} with a score of {NUM} out of 100 and a proposed fee of {AMOUNT}. Second-ranked firm came in at {NUM} and {AMOUNT}. I recommend we negotiate a contract with {BIZ}. Their team has done similar work for three other Cook County municipalities. Please let me know how you would like to proceed — I can bring the recommendation to council on {DATE} if you want a formal vote.
reply_tmpl: Tom — proceed with the council presentation on {DATE}. Please have a contract draft from the Village Attorney ready at the same time so we can authorize on the same motion. Good work on the RFP process.

subject_tmpl: Question About Permit Requirements — Shed at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hello, I live at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} and I would like to put up a storage shed, approximately {NUM} by {NUM} feet, in my backyard. Do I need a permit for that size? Also, how close to the fence line can I put it? I've heard different things from neighbors. I'd rather ask before I start. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I can be reached at {PHONE} if easier to call. Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST} — sheds under {NUM} square feet generally do not require a permit in Bellwood, but must meet setback requirements of {NUM} feet from any property line. For a shed over {NUM} sq ft, a permit is required. I recommend calling our office at your convenience and we can give you the exact requirements for your zoning district.

body_tmpl: Yolanda, here are the bid opening results from today ({DATE}) for the {STREET} Resurfacing contract. We received {NUM} bids. Low bidder: Verdi Excavating at {AMOUNT}. Second low: {BIZ} at {AMOUNT}. Engineer's estimate was {AMOUNT}. Verdi's bid is {NUM} percent below estimate, which is within acceptable range. I recommend award to Verdi Excavating. Please prepare a council agenda item for the {DATE} meeting for award of contract. I will provide the bid tabulation and my written recommendation by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Tom — I'll put it on the {DATE} agenda under Unfinished Business. Send me your recommendation memo by {DATE} and I'll make sure it's in the council packet.

body_tmpl: Tom, a permit application came in for a basement addition at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. When I checked our GIS overlay, the parcel appears to be in or very near the FEMA 100-year floodplain. Before I can process this permit I need your floodplain administrator determination — specifically, whether the project triggers substantial improvement review under our floodplain ordinance. The applicant is {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE} and is anxious to get moving. Permit application number is {CASE}. Can you take a look and let me know your determination within {DAYS} business days?
reply_tmpl: Rosa — I pulled the FIRM panel. The property is in Zone AE with a Base Flood Elevation of {NUM} feet. The proposed work does appear to meet the substantial improvement threshold. I'll prepare a written determination and the applicant will need an Elevation Certificate before we can proceed. I'll contact {FIRST} {LAST} directly.

body_tmpl: Frank, following the {DATE} storm event ({NUM} inches in {NUM} hours), here are the flooding locations your crew should document and address in priority order. First: {STREET} at {CROSS} — roadway overtopping reported by PD, inlet may be blocked. Second: {ADDRESS} on {STREET} — standing water complaint received, check downstream culvert. Third: the detention basin on {STREET} — verify outlet control structure is functioning and document high-water mark. Please send me your field notes by {DATE}. I will use them to update the stormwater study.
reply_tmpl: Tom — crews out now on all three. Inlet at {STREET}/{CROSS} was partially blocked with debris; cleared and flowing. Will have field notes to you by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Concern About Permit Timeline — {BIZ} Expansion at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I am the owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. We submitted plans for our building expansion on {DATE} — {DAYS} days ago — and we have not received plan review comments. Our contractor has a crew available starting {DATE} and the delay is costing us {AMOUNT} a week in holding costs. We are committed to investing in Bellwood and I hope the Village can help move this along. I'd appreciate a call at {PHONE} at your convenience. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — thank you for your investment in Bellwood. I have spoken with our Building Official and your plans are in review. You should receive comments by {DATE}. I apologize for the delay and want to ensure we support your project. Please don't hesitate to call me directly.

subject_tmpl: Washington Blvd Streetscape — Design Milestone Update
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the 30-percent design milestone for the Washington Boulevard streetscape project has been completed by the design team. The concept includes new decorative lighting from {CROSS} to {CROSS}, brick paver crosswalks at {NUM} key intersections, and expanded tree pits with soil cells. We held a public meeting on {DATE} with {NUM} residents attending and received generally positive feedback. One outstanding issue is the parking configuration in front of {ADDRESS} — I will present two options at our next project team meeting on {DATE}. Full design completion is expected by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Tom — excellent progress. Can you put together a visual board showing the lighting and paver options? I'd like to display it at Village Hall for a few weeks before we finalize. Keep the momentum going.

body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, please find below the year-end building permit statistics for the calendar year ending {DATE}. Total permits issued: {NUM}. New construction: {NUM} units. Permit revenue: {AMOUNT} — a {NUM}-percent increase over the prior year. Largest project: {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}, valued at {AMOUNT}. Inspections performed: {NUM}. Stop-work orders issued: {NUM}. Certificates of occupancy granted: {NUM}. The department handled a record volume this year with the same staffing level. I recommend we discuss staffing in the budget cycle for next year.

subject_tmpl: Grant Reimbursement Request — CMAP Stormwater Project
body_tmpl: David, we are ready to submit our first reimbursement request to CMAP for the {STREET} stormwater project. Eligible expenses incurred through {DATE} total {AMOUNT}: {AMOUNT} in engineering fees and {AMOUNT} in construction costs. Under the grant agreement, the reimbursable amount at {NUM} percent federal share is {AMOUNT}. I have the invoices and payment documentation ready. Please initiate the reimbursement request in the GATA portal by {DATE} to avoid any delays in the draw cycle. Let me know what sign-offs you need from me.
reply_tmpl: Tom — I'll initiate the request. I need your certification of completion for the engineering phase and the contractor's schedule of values through {DATE}. Once I have those, expect processing in {DAYS} days.

body_tmpl: Karen, Illinois has adopted the 2024 International Building Code effective {DATE}. Bellwood's current ordinance references the 2018 IBC. We need to update our adoption ordinance before {DATE} to remain in compliance with state law. I have drafted an ordinance amendment for the Village Attorney's review. Key changes affecting local inspections include updated energy code requirements and new provisions for electric vehicle charging infrastructure. I'd like to target the {DATE} council meeting for the adoption vote. Can you place this on Karen's agenda and confirm the attorney review timeline?
reply_tmpl: Rosa — I'll put this on the attorney review list with a target opinion by {DATE}. I agree the {DATE} council meeting makes sense. Prepare a brief staff memo for the packet summarizing the practical impacts on local contractors.
